Document:
# Core Rule 4 - Do not be sexual or shocking [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule. Do not engage in sexual or shocking acts or topics. [color=SlateGray](As a rule of thumb, follow the existing tone of the game. Although SS14 contains sensitive topics such as crime, violence, gore, horror, substance abuse, and physical and mental health, players should not feel additional offense.)[/color]
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Using expletives such as "motherfucker," "dickhead," or "shitcunt." - Describing sensitive topics such as in-game vomit, gore, and mob reproduction mechanics.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Making sexually inappropriate remarks or character names. - Roleplaying erotically. - Referencing offensive topics such as genitalia, torture, and human waste. - Describing sensitive topics in unnecessary detail or frequency.
